text:
"Gods Message" is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 1 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 1.

In the film, the song is featured during the battle for the Tesseract between Asuka and the Evangelion Mark.04B during Operation US. 

Lyrics

 
 
Teachings of ancient prophets 
Teachings of ancient prophets
Scriptures of God's own message
Delivering God's message

Moral codes by which we have chosen to heed Biblical instructions which will govern our existence
 

Trivia

This soundtrack is a remake of "Babel No Hikari" from the anime ', which was also directed by Hideki Anno with music composed by Shiro Sagisu.
